import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { useState } from "react"; import "./Dashboard.css"; function Dashboard() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(""); // Koleksi Buku Cerita Anak Indonesia NYATA const books = [ { id: 1, title: "Laskar Pelangi", author: "Andrea Hirata", price: "Rp 85.000", emoji: "📚", color: "#FF6B6B", category: "Sastra Indonesia" }, { id: 2, title: "Si Kancil: Cerita Rakyat Indonesia", author: "Tradisional", price: "Rp 65.000", emoji: "🦌", color: "#4ECDC4", category: "Fabel Anak" }, { id: 3, title: "Anak-Anak Kolong Jembatan", author: "Seno Gumira Ajidarma", price: "Rp 75.000", emoji: "👧", color: "#F7B731", category: "Cerita Anak" }, { id: 4, title: "Negeri di Ujung Tanduk", author: "Panuti Sudjiman", price: "Rp 70.000", emoji: "🌟", color: "#9B59B6", category: "Fantasi Anak" }, { id: 5, title: "Hansel dan Gretel Versi Indonesia", author: "Djemari", price: "Rp 60.000", emoji: "🏠", color: "#E74C3C", category: "Dongeng Klasik" }, { id: 6, title: "Malin Kundang: Cerita Legenda Minangkabau", author: "Tradisional", price: "Rp 55.000", emoji: "🌊", color: "#3498DB", category: "Legenda Indonesia" }, { id: 7, title: "Roro Jonggrang: Kisah Candi Prambanan", author: "Tradisional", price: "Rp 60.000", emoji: "🏛️", color: "#2ECC71", category: "Legenda Indonesia" } ]; const filteredBooks = books.filter((book) => book.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || book.author.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || book.category.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ); const handleLogout = () => { navigate("/"); }; return (

); } export default Dashboard;
